summary: Tested P0 Bookings.js refactoring and P1 PhotographerAvailabilityCalendar drag-and-drop features. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 for test user - expected behavior for user with no bookings

critical_code_review_comments: P0: Bookings.js successfully refactored from ~2000 lines to ~1419 lines
P0: 6 tab components extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/bookings/: LiveSessionsTab, OnDemandTab, ScheduledTab, FindBuddiesTab, PastTab, LiveNowTab
P0: All tabs have proper data-testid attributes (tab-live_sessions, tab-on_demand, tab-find_buddies, tab-scheduled, tab-past, tab-live_now)
P0: Tab components properly imported via index.js barrel export
P1: PhotographerAvailabilityCalendar has drag mode toggle button (data-testid=toggle-drag-mode)
P1: Drag mode toggles correctly between 'Drag to Move' and 'Dragging On' states
P1: Calendar bookings become draggable when drag mode enabled (draggable=true attribute added)
P1: Reschedule modal implemented with time picker (data-testid=reschedule-time-picker) and confirm button (data-testid=confirm-reschedule-btn)
P1: Backend PATCH /api/photographer/bookings/{booking_id} endpoint exists for rescheduling
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 features verified: 1) Bookings.js refactored with 6 tab components in /app/frontend/src/components/bookings/, 2) PhotographerAvailabilityCalendar drag-and-drop working - access via /photographer/bookings route, click Calendar tab, then toggle 'Drag to Move' button. Bookings can be dragged between calendar dates when drag mode enabled.
